description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses alpine:3.7 as the default Docker image and defines two test-stage jobs, code_quality and libstopwatch. The code_quality job runs on the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, exports SP_VERSION from CI_SERVER_VERSION using a sed command, and then executes a docker run of the GitLab Code Quality image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/codequality:$SP_VERSION mounting the source code and Docker socket, allowing failure and storing gl-code-quality-report.json as an artifact. The libstopwatch job runs on the default alpine:3.7 image, installs make, cmake, g++, and gcovr via apk, creates a build directory, runs cmake with CXX_FLAGS from the CXX_FLAGS variable, builds with make, runs make test, and generates a coverage report with gcovr using specific exclude patterns, and defines a coverage regex /^TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\%)$/ . Define a global variable CXX_FLAGS set to "--coverage -Werror -Wall -Wpedantic -Weffc++" for the libstopwatch job. No caches or additional triggers are specified.
